title: [Fixed] Improved Low Shield
description: the best low shield out there. maybe side shield
body:
**_am really sorry i didnt notice the pack was corropted in the last year but i was checking my packs and fond it ,i dont know how this happiend but it fixed now ❤️_**


# what is that? 

**Improved Low Shield** – Make your combat smoother and clearer!  

This lightweight resource pack lowers your shield when blocking or holding it, giving you:  
-  **Better visibility** during fights  
-  **Clean, modern shield position**  
-  **No gameplay changes** – just a visual improvement  
-  **Works with any texture pack** that changes the shield, since it's just a simple code file  
-  **Perfect for PvP and survival**  

Enhance your gameplay experience while keeping everything familiar.  

![Low shield preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2387ac60777bf623f445670265b8d4f1ae4f44.jpeg)
